summary: Comprehensive testing of new features: (1) Expert specialization_label visibility in Q&A answers (fresh DB lookup), (2) Redesigned verification request system with new fields (requested_role, specialization_text, profile_link, message), (3) Admin approval sets user role automatically, (4) UserProfilePage shows role badge + specialization_label, (5) QnASection ExpertIdentity shows spec label dynamically. All 15 backend tests PASS. All frontend UI tests PASS.

minor.issue: Old test file /app/backend/tests/test_verification_specialization.py uses status='reviewed' which is no longer valid (new API only accepts 'approved'/'rejected'). Running old tests would fail on TestVerificationStatusUpdate tests. This test file should be updated.
minor.priority: LOW - does not affect production, only affects test suite if re-run

design_issues.screen: Admin Ověření tab - pending requests badge
issues: Orange dot badge IS visible on the Ověření tab on admin page load (shows '2' in screenshot). The badge appears correctly on initial load.

action_items: MINOR: Update /app/backend/tests/test_verification_specialization.py to use 'approved'/'rejected' instead of 'reviewed' for the status tests, since the new API removed 'reviewed' as a valid status.
MINOR: The old verification requests with 'request_type' field (old format) appear correctly in AdminVerificationTab via the reqField() helper - backward compat confirmed working.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/questions: batch-refresh of specialization_labels from users collection is correctly implemented - labels come from fresh DB lookup for each request, not stale embedded data in answers.

PUT /api/admin/verification-requests/{id}/status: correctly sets user role on approval (role_to_set = req.get('requested_role', 'specialist')), does NOT change role on rejection. Falls back to 'specialist' for invalid role values.
AdminVerificationTab: reqField() helper correctly handles both old (request_type/specialization) and new (requested_role/specialization_text) field names - backward compat working.
UserProfilePage: ROLE_BADGES dict with specialist/lawyer/admin entries, conditional rendering of badge + specialization_label confirmed working on Marta's profile.
QnASection: ExpertIdentity component at line 35 shows specLabel dynamically from answer.specialization_label (which is fresh from DB lookup). Confirmed working with Marta's 'plastický chirurg' label.
ProfilePage: New verification form has all 4 required fields with correct data-testid attributes. checkExistingVerifRequest() on mount correctly pre-disables button if pending request exists.
seed_data_creation: Created test users: TEST_iter51_verif@bloom.cz (specialist verification), TEST_iter51_approve@bloom.cz (approved as specialist), TEST_iter51_lawyer_* (approved as lawyer), TEST_iter51_reject@bloom.cz (rejected), TEST_iter51_my@bloom.cz, TEST_iter51_viewer@bloom.cz. Several verification requests created and processed during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 new features fully tested and working. Key notes: (1) Rate limiter allows 10 login attempts per 300s per IP - backend tests + browser tests combined can exhaust this quickly. Wait 5 min if hitting 429. (2) testIdPrefix in SpecialistsPage is 'spec-question' (not 'question'). LegalPage uses 'question'. (3) Public profile /api/users/{id}/public-profile requires auth token. (4) Marta's user ID is 3b26f016-77b8-4378-923c-77e6fbf5bdb6, role=specialist, specialization_label='plastický chirurg'. (5) AdminVerificationTab accepts status 'approved'/'rejected' only (not 'reviewed' anymore). (6) Verification form button is disabled when user has pending request (persisted via checkExistingVerifRequest() on mount).

detailed_test_results.BE3_fresh_db_lookup_not_stale: PASS - verified batch-refresh from users collection
detailed_test_results.BE4_post_verification_request_new_fields: PASS - requested_role, specialization_text, profile_link, message accepted
detailed_test_results.BE5_admin_sees_new_field_names: PASS - requested_role present in admin list
detailed_test_results.BE6_approve_sets_role_specialist: PASS - user.role changed to 'specialist' on approval
detailed_test_results.BE7_approve_sets_role_lawyer: PASS - user.role changed to 'lawyer' on approval
detailed_test_results.BE10_old_format_backward_compat: PASS - admin list returns mixed format without crash
detailed_test_results.FE3_dialog_opens: PASS (confirmed from previous iteration, button disabled in this run)
detailed_test_results.FE14_admin_verif_tab_exists: PASS - with amber badge showing pending count
detailed_test_results.FE15_admin_verif_tab_renders: PASS - no crash on mixed old/new format requests
